meta.title: Does the US Navy have ROBOT SHARKS prowling the ocean?
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

-- BREAK -- 

Back in 2014, the U.S. Navy drew headlines around the world by testing a biomimetic uncrewed undersea vehicle (UUV) designed to replicate the undersea performance of real fish. The result was a robotic shark known as the Ghost Swimmer. 

But shortly after this robo-shark effort took the media by storm, the program went almost completely silent... With no further press releases or public tests of the system. One might think that means the Ghost Swimmer program ended there and then, but based on the evidence we've found, those tests were just the beginning. 

Let's dive into Boston Engineering's Ghost Swimmer AUV, and see if we can't get to the bottom of this mystery.
